things.name: Schonbrunn Palace & Gardens
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Habsburg imperial summer palace with 1,441 rooms and formal gardens

things.name: Kunsthistorisches Museum
things.description: One of the world's greatest art museums — the Habsburg imperial collection with Bruegel, Vermeer and Raphael

things.name: Belvedere Palace & Gardens
things.description: Baroque palace complex housing Klimt's The Kiss — the most visited artwork in Austria

things.name: St Stephen's Cathedral
things.description: Vienna's Gothic heart — climb the South Tower for views or descend to the Habsburg catacombs

things.name: Vienna State Opera
things.description: One of the world's leading opera houses — backstage tours daily and standing tickets available cheaply

things.name: Naschmarkt Open Air Market
things.description: Vienna's most famous market — 120 stalls of international food, spices, wine and Viennese coffee culture

things.name: Prater & Giant Ferris Wheel
things.description: Historic amusement park with the 1897 Riesenrad wheel offering panoramic views of Vienna

things.name: Hofburg Imperial Palace
things.description: The Habsburg's winter residence — visit the Imperial Apartments, Sisi Museum and Imperial Silver Collection

things.name: Sigmund Freud Museum
things.description: Freud's actual apartment and consulting rooms where psychoanalysis was born — the famous couch replica

things.name: Viennese Coffee House Culture
things.description: UNESCO Intangible Heritage — linger for hours in a grand 19th-century Kaffeehaus like Cafe Central
